summary: Comprehensive testing of 4 new features for Graupner Suite: Mahnwesen (Dunning), Dashboard Charts, EK-Preise (Purchase Prices), and PDF improvements. Fixed critical route ordering bug in /api/invoices/overdue endpoint. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working.

fixed.issue: Route was defined AFTER /api/invoices/{invoice_id}, causing 'overdue' to be matched as invoice_id and returning 404
fixed.fix: Moved /api/invoices/overdue route definition BEFORE /api/invoices/{invoice_id} in server.py

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/invoices/overdue returns overdue invoices with days_overdue field
Backend: POST /api/invoices/{id}/dunning advances dunning level (1->2->3)
Backend: Dunning level cannot exceed 3 (returns 400 error)
Backend: GET /api/pdf/dunning/{id} returns PDF for dunning letter
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/stats includes monthly revenue data (6 months)
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/stats includes invoice_statuses breakdown (Offen, Gesendet, Bezahlt, Überfällig)
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/stats includes overdue_count
Backend: POST /api/articles with purchase_price field saves correctly
Backend: POST /api/services with purchase_price field saves correctly
Backend: GET /api/articles returns purchase_price field
Backend: GET /api/services returns purchase_price field
Backend: PUT /api/articles/{id} updates purchase_price correctly
Backend: GET /api/pdf/quote/{id} returns valid PDF
Backend: GET /api/pdf/invoice/{id} returns valid PDF
Backend: Invoice overdue workflow (create -> verify due_date -> dunning_level 0)
Frontend: Dashboard shows BarChart 'Umsatz (letzte 6 Monate)' with monthly revenue
Frontend: Dashboard shows PieChart 'Rechnungsstatus' with status breakdown
Frontend: Dashboard shows '1 überfällig' indicator
Frontend: Invoices page has 'Mahnwesen' tab with overdue count badge (1)
Frontend: Mahnwesen tab shows overdue invoice with days_overdue, Mahnstufe, download/paid buttons
Frontend: Article modal has 'EK-Preis (Netto €)' field and 'Marge' display
Frontend: Article cards show 'EK: 65.00 € (46%)' for articles with purchase_price
Frontend: Service modal has 'EK-Preis (Netto €)' field and 'Marge' display
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Route ordering bug - /api/invoices/overdue must be defined BEFORE /api/invoices/{invoice_id} to prevent FastAPI from matching 'overdue' as an invoice_id
All 4 new features properly implemented: Mahnwesen, Dashboard Charts, EK-Preise, PDF improvements
Dunning workflow correctly advances levels 1->2->3 with proper status updates
Dashboard stats endpoint returns comprehensive data for charts (monthly, invoice_statuses, overdue_count)
Purchase price field properly integrated in Article and Service models with margin calculation
seed_data_creation: Test articles and services created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: 4 new features fully tested and working: 1) Mahnwesen - GET /api/invoices/overdue, POST /api/invoices/{id}/dunning, GET /api/pdf/dunning/{id}. 2) Dashboard Charts - GET /api/dashboard/stats returns monthly, invoice_statuses, overdue_count. 3) EK-Preise - purchase_price field in Article/Service models, displayed in cards and modals with margin calculation. 4) PDF improvements - company footer in all PDF documents. Route ordering fix applied to server.py.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: FastAPI route ordering - /api/invoices/{invoice_id} was defined at line 696, while /api/invoices/overdue was defined at line 838. FastAPI matches routes in order, so 'overdue' was being treated as an invoice_id parameter.
rca_of_the_issue.mitigation: Moved /api/invoices/overdue route definition to be BEFORE /api/invoices/{invoice_id} in server.py (now at line 696, before the parameterized route)
